entries.title: Notes on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical on AI
entries.summary: Dropped this morning by the Vatican: Magnifica Humanitas of His Holiness Pope Leo XIV on Safeguarding the Human Person in the Time of Artificial Intelligence . This is a very interesting document. It's some of the clearest writing I've seen on the ethics of integrating AI into modern society. entries.title: Dupes and downgrades should always have an explanation
entries.summary: Dupes and downgrades should always have an explanation the_IDORminator: When you log issues on a program that mark bugs "duplicate of a previously submitted report" with no supporting details - run as fast as you can -- and don't look back. Either they lie, can't read, or don't fix bugs, and none of these options are good for you.

entries.title: 亿赛通CDG文件服务器任意文件上传漏洞分析
entries.summary: CDG文件服务器的 uploadSoftWareFile 接口存在路径遍历漏洞和目录控制绕过漏洞。攻击者通过构造特殊请求参数，可以绕过目录访问限制，将恶意文件写入服务器任意可写目录，最终实现远程代码执行（RCE）。
